description_long: This is a rectangular, wall-mounted outdoor air conditioning unit, primarily finished in a light gray or off-white color. The front face features a large circular metal grille protecting the fan, with a visible LG brand logo in red and white on the upper right. The grille consists of concentric rings and radial spokes, providing both airflow and safety. The sides and back of the unit are plain, with minimal detailing, while the bottom edge shows some subtle weathering and wear. The overall construction appears robust, with a metal housing and likely internal components such as a compressor and heat exchanger.
description: A rectangular, light gray wall-mounted air conditioner with a large circular grille and an LG logo on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular metal grille, fan blades, and the LG logo on the upper right.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, flat metal surface with minimal features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat metal panel with no visible vents or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also plain, with a slight protrusion at the bottom edge.
attribute_brand_logo: A red and white circular LG logo is present on the upper right of the front face.
attribute_grille_pattern: The grille has a circular pattern with concentric rings and evenly spaced radial spokes, forming a protective mesh.
attribute_exhaust_vent_design: The exhaust vent is integrated behind the circular front grille, with a single large opening for airflow.
